# MAHJ MAHJ

> MAHJ MAHJ is a community platform for mahjong players in the United States.
  It covers three major styles: Hong Kong Mahjong, Taiwanese Mahjong, and American Mahjong.
  The platform helps players find local events, learn game rules and strategy, and connect
  with other players in cities across the US including Los Angeles, New York, San Francisco,
  Miami, Boston, and more.

## Events
- [Find Mahjong Events](https://mahjmahj.co/events): Browse upcoming mahjong events by city and style
- [Los Angeles Events](https://mahjmahj.co/events/los-angeles): Mahjong events in Los Angeles
- [New York Events](https://mahjmahj.co/events/new-york): Mahjong events in New York
- [San Francisco Events](https://mahjmahj.co/events/san-francisco): Mahjong events in San Francisco

## Mahjong Styles
- [Hong Kong Mahjong](https://mahjmahj.co/styles/hong-kong-mahjong): Learn about Hong Kong Mahjong rules and strategy
- [Taiwanese Mahjong](https://mahjmahj.co/styles/taiwanese-mahjong): Learn about Taiwanese Mahjong rules and strategy
- [American Mahjong](https://mahjmahj.co/styles/american-mahjong): Learn about American Mahjong rules and strategy
- [Compare Mahjong Styles](https://mahjmahj.co/compare/mahjong-styles): Side-by-side comparison of all three styles

## Learn
- [How to Play Mahjong](https://mahjmahj.co/learn/how-to-play-mahjong): Beginner-friendly guide to getting started
- [Which Style Is Right for Me?](https://mahjmahj.co/learn/which-mahjong-style-is-right-for-me): Find the mahjong style that fits you

## Community
- [About MAHJ MAHJ](https://mahjmahj.co/about): Learn about the platform and the US mahjong community

## App
- [MAHJ MAHJ App](https://app.mahjmahj.co): Mobile app for finding events, saving favorites, and connecting with players
